lineage_provenance.raw: gruntz thca flower essential 28g strain profile gruntz thca flower is a flavor led hybrid in the broader runtz family that brings a heavier gassy edge to the classic candy sweet profile. the cultivar produces dense frost coated buds with the kind of layered aromatic character that combines tropical fruit candy with a subtle fuel undertone. effects gruntz delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. the high feels well rounded and pleasant — suitable for late afternoon use social settings or evening flavor led decompression — with the kind of contrasting character that distinguishes runtz gas crosses. flavor & aroma on the palate sweet tropical fruit up front with sugary candy through the middle and a warm gas finish on the exhale. smoke is full and unmistakably layered. the terpene profile reads candy and gas — see the coa for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. lab tested — view the coa every gruntz harvest is third party tested for cannabinoid content terpenes residual solvents pesticides and heavy metals. download the gruntz thca flower certificate of analysis for full test results. tiers explained our three quality tiers are supreme — hand selected top shelf buds with the densest structure highest trichome coverage and strongest terpene expression. preferred — premium grade flower at a balanced price using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. essential — our value tier using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. federally compliant hemp lit farms gruntz thca flower is hemp derived and federally compliant under the 2018 farm bill — containing less than 0.3% δ9 thc by dry weight at harvest. must be 21+ to purchase. not for sale in jurisdictions where thca flower is restricted. explore our full thca flower collection for more strains. hybrid sugar sweet tropical fruit thca flower lost in translation

fuel with the irresistible dessert sweetness of wedding pie — producing dense buds with serious bag appeal and a flavor profile that genuinely uses both halves of its genetic stack. effects petrol pie delivers a harmonious balance of energizing onset and smooth descent into relaxation. the high feels engaging up front — good for users who want a thrill component — before settling into a comfortable body easy baseline. a versatile cultivar for late afternoon use social settings or evening unwinding. flavor & aroma on the nose pungent jet fuel up front with sweet pastry cake through the middle and high octane thca weight 14g high octane thca tests at 28.06% thca and delivers a mid high potency hybrid experience with a distinctly fuel forward personality. the effects come on with a fast head change then build into a deeper body relaxation that feels grounding and full bodied by the end of the session. this strain carries a darker gassier profile than sweeter dessert hybrids which gives it blue dream thca flower 1g type 1 thca what is blue dream thca flower strain? blue dream thca flower strain is a beloved sativa dominant hybrid resulting from the cross of blueberry and haze often credited to the legendary breeder dj short from santa cruz. this strain has become a staple in the cannabis world cherished for its balanced cerebral buzz and full body relaxation making it a versatile choice for both recreational and medicinal users. blue dream terpenes blue dream's terpene profile is a blend of pinene contributes a fresh pine like aroma potentially aiding in alertness and memory retention. myrcene adds an earthy musky scent known for its sedative effects enhancing the strain's relaxing properties. caryophyllene brings a spicy peppery note which might offer anti inflammatory benefits complementing the strain's therapeutic profile. these terpenes not only shape blue dream's distinctive aroma but also enhance its overall effects. blue dream strain cannabinoids thca 24.51% total cannabinoids 25.44% total terpenes 1.36% d9 thc 0.24% blue dream thca strain effects blue dream delivers a well balanced high starting with a clear headed euphoria that sparks creativity and focus making it excellent for daytime activities. as the experience evolves it transitions into a gentle soothing body relaxation easing physical tension without overwhelming drowsiness. this makes blue dream a versatile choice for users looking to maintain productivity while enjoying a sense of calm and well being. genotype blueberry x haze (bred by dj short) phenotype blue dream hemp flower contains less than .3% delta 9 thc for adult use only already vibin’??? 👉might as well explore the full thca hemp flower collection. or... 👉check out our cbd hemp flower collection for a smoother vibe. caryophyllene day delta 9 thc evening high thca hybrid indoor myrcene night no oregon pinene sativa tag hot 24% thca tag hot sativa flower exotic thc a flower

blue cherry gelato thca flower 14g click here for coa blue cherry gelato is a pretty dope strain if you’re into something that’s both flavorful and potent. this hybrid is a cross between blue nerdz and lemon cherry gelato giving rise to its delightful features together. blue cherry gelato lives up to its name with a seriously sweet and fruity profile. you’re going to get these rich berry notes—think of a mix of blueberries and cherries—combined with a creamy dessert like quality from the gelato lineage. the smell is similarly fruity with a touch of earthy undertones giving it a well rounded indulgent vibe. when you light up blue cherry gelato the high kicks in with a happy euphoric buzz. it’s great for lifting your mood and making you feel more social or creative. the initial head high is uplifting and energizing perfect for hanging out with friends or diving into a fun activity. as the high settles it shifts to a more relaxed mellow state. you’ll still be uplifted but with a calming chill vibe that’s great for winding down or enjoying a movie. this strain is also known for helping with stress and anxiety and it can give you a solid case of the munchies so keep some snacks nearby. it’s a versatile strain that works well for both day and evening use depending on how much you smoke. overall blue cherry gelato is a great choice if you’re into a flavorful strain that delivers a balanced high with both uplifting and relaxing effects. it’s tasty smooth and perfect for enhancing your mood or just kicking back. terpenes myrcene this is often the dominant terpene in blue cherry gelato. myrcene has a sweet earthy and musky aroma with hints of fruit. it’s known for its relaxing and sedative effects which contribute to the strain’s calming qualities. myrcene helps create the strain’s mellow soothing body high and complements the sweet creamy flavor profile. limonene adding a zesty citrusy note to the aroma and flavor limonene is known for its mood enhancing properties. it contributes to the uplifting and euphoric aspects of the high making blue cherry gelato feel more energizing and positive. this terpene enhances the strain’s overall flavor with a touch of brightness and helps with stress relief. caryophyllene with its spicy peppery aroma caryophyllene adds a bit of complexity to blue cherry gelato’s flavor. it’s unique because it can interact with the body’s cannabinoid

doap 3.5g introducing doap thca flower by green dawg. this balanced hybrid was created from dessert forward genetics. it packs a punch of creamy candy sweetness with notes of soft citrus subtle floral undertones and a rich smooth finish. ◆ balanced hybrid ◆ small batch premium indoor boutique creative euphoric no 15% flower green dawg

lemon cherry beltz thca flower preferred 28g strain profile lemon cherry beltz thca flower is an elite flavor packed hybrid engineered for connoisseurs who demand a sensory explosion alongside top tier potency. a masterful fusion of the wildly popular lemon cherry gelato and the legendary candy forward rainbow belts this cultivar represents the pinnacle of modern boutique breeding. the buds are striking and intricately structured displaying a vibrant contrast of lime greens deep magenta pockets and vivid orange pistils. the entire flower is heavily dusted in a thick sticky layer of crystalline trichomes highlighting its exceptional thca content and pristine resinous cure. effects lemon cherry beltz offers a perfectly balanced multi dimensional high that satisfies both the mind and the body. the experience begins with an immediate uplifting cerebral rush that sparks creativity elevates the mood and induces a blissful carefree euphoria. as the mental buzz settles into a comfortable starlit haze a soothing wave of physical relaxation begins to radiate through the limbs. it effectively melts away daily stress and minor physical tension without causing immediate sedation making it incredibly versatile. it is the ultimate choice for elevating social gatherings unlocking creative focus or enjoying a premium afternoon wind down. flavor & aroma true to its star studded lineage lemon cherry beltz delivers a loud mouth watering terpene profile that perfectly captures the essence of sour fruit candy and gassy dessert genetics. cracking open a bud unleashes a pungent blast of tart zesty lemons and sweet overripe cherries wrapped in a sugary candied confection background with a sharp hint of fuel. the smoke is remarkably smooth and full bodied on the inhale the palate is coated in a lip smacking flavor of sour citrus and mixed berry glaze while the exhale shifts beautifully to a smooth creamy gelato finish with a lingering touch of classic gassy candy dust. lab tested — view the coa lab tested — view the coa tiers explained our three quality tiers are supreme — hand selected top shelf buds with the densest structure highest trichome coverage and strongest terpene expression. preferred — premium grade flower at a balanced price using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. essential — our value tier using the same strain and lab testing with smaller
